response.justification: While the candidate exceeds all technical requirements with expert-level TypeScript, React, REST API, and database experience, they are severely overqualified for an entry-level position. A Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience and multiple senior roles represents a significant flight risk and salary expectation mismatch. The role seeks someone at the beginning of their career; this candidate likely needs more responsibility and compensation than an entry-level position provides.
strengths: Expert-level TypeScript and full-stack capabilities across web, mobile, and backend systems
Demonstrated mastery of clean software architecture through teaching workshops, TDD advocacy, and multiple senior engineering roles
Proven collaborative skills with diverse team experiences across multiple countries and mentoring other developers
concerns: Severely overqualified—Staff-level engineer applying for entry-level role creates high flight risk and retention concerns
Recent role focus on MongoDB rather than PostgreSQL/relational databases preferred for this position
Unexplained career step-down from Staff to entry-level raises questions about motivation and role expectations
